institution.name: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.9k → $41.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill are 59% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($72.2k vs $45.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.1k → $14.0k).
